name: mcp-forge
description: Convert any application into an MCP server using AI — analyze, generate, test, rollback, and chat with the forge agent from inside Claude Code.
author: MCP Forge

FORGE_TOKEN.description: MCP Forge auth token — run: docker exec mcp_forge_app printenv MCP_AUTH_TOKEN

skills.name: forge:analyze
skills.description: Analyze a project's source code or OpenAPI spec and detect endpoints, schemas, auth

skills.name: forge:generate
skills.description: Generate a Python FastMCP / Node.js / Go MCP server from analyzed endpoints

skills.name: forge:chat
skills.description: Chat with the AI forge agent for a project — ask it to refactor, clarify, or explain decisions

skills.name: forge:status
skills.description: List all projects and their current status

skills.name: forge:test
skills.description: Run AI-generated tests against the generated MCP server

skills.name: forge:rollback
skills.description: Roll back a project to a previous snapshot version
